meta.name: GCW: Joey Janela's Spring Break: The Immortal Clusterfuck
meta.description: Joey Janela's Spring Break: The Immortal Clusterfuck 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Game Changer Wrestling (GCW) that took place on April 18, 2026, in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA. Part of the annual Spring Break series during WrestleMania weekend, the show featured Joey Janela’s signature Immortal Clusterfuck match, a chaotic battle royal-style spectacle bringing together wrestlers and personalities from multiple eras, along with a mix of high-profile independent matches and surprise appearances.
